CTRL-STABLE-COMMANDS.description: Stable command map (bootstrap/check/test/security/evals/verify) exists so verification is reproducible.
CTRL-STABLE-COMMANDS.remediation: Add the stable Make targets and wire them to real tools.

CTRL-SCOPE-ENFORCEMENT.description: An executable scope gate diffs each candidate against its immutable task write-scope and roles.
CTRL-SCOPE-ENFORCEMENT.remediation: Restore scripts/aers/scope.py and the scope-check command.

CTRL-PROTECTED-PATHS.description: A protected-paths policy classifies control-plane, test, generated and sensitive paths, enforced by the scope gate and hooks.

CTRL-STATIC-CHECKS.description: A control-plane lint validates schemas, JSON/TOML/Python, placeholders and doc drift.
CTRL-STATIC-CHECKS.remediation: Wire `make check` to `aers lint` plus your formatter/linter/type checks.

CTRL-TEST-SUITE.description: A discoverable test suite exists and runs from the stable command map.
CTRL-TEST-SUITE.remediation: Add a tests/ tree and wire `make test`.

CTRL-DETERMINISTIC-AUDIT.description: A deterministic, model-free audit runs before any model review (tamper/secret/dangerous-command detection).
CTRL-DETERMINISTIC-AUDIT.remediation: Restore scripts/aers/audit.py and the audit command.

CTRL-CONTRACT-INTEGRITY.description: Feature/task contracts are typed, schema-validated, and read at an immutable ref.
CTRL-CONTRACT-INTEGRITY.remediation: Provide the feature-contract and tasks schemas and the contract loader.

CTRL-DIFFERENTIAL-TEST.description: New regression tests must fail on the base revision (a non-discriminating test is rejected).
CTRL-DIFFERENTIAL-TEST.remediation: Enable the differential gate in author-verify and require it in Standard+.

CTRL-REVIEWER-INDEPENDENCE.description: An independent reviewer in a separate context reviews the exact candidate, bound to its digest.
CTRL-REVIEWER-INDEPENDENCE.remediation: Wire AERS_REVIEWER_CMD_JSON with a reviewer that binds to candidate_sha.

CTRL-SECOND-REVIEWER-R2.description: R2 work requires a second reviewer from a meaningfully different harness/model.
CTRL-SECOND-REVIEWER-R2.remediation: Set verification.require_second_reviewer_r2 = true and wire AERS_SECOND_REVIEWER_CMD_JSON.

CTRL-ISOLATION.description: Network/sandbox isolation is classified by an explicit truth model; asserted is not proven.
CTRL-ISOLATION.remediation: Adopt the isolation truth model and fail closed for R2+ on ASSERTED_ISOLATED.

CTRL-EXTERNAL-VERIFIER.description: A separate protected verifier trust domain (repo/service) issues VERIFIED; local code cannot.
CTRL-EXTERNAL-VERIFIER.remediation: Deploy the external verifier reference in a separate protected repository or runner.

CTRL-PRIVATE-ORACLE.description: Private tests/holdouts live outside the author trust domain and are never exposed to candidate code.
CTRL-PRIVATE-ORACLE.remediation: Host private holdouts in the verifier trust domain, not in this repository.

CTRL-ATTESTATION.description: Attestations bind candidate, policy, and evidence digests and resist tamper/substitution/replay.
CTRL-ATTESTATION.remediation: Adopt the DSSE-style attestation and verify_attestation binding checks.

CTRL-SIGNED-PROVENANCE.description: Released artifacts carry signed build provenance (SLSA/in-toto style) from the verifier domain.
CTRL-SIGNED-PROVENANCE.remediation: Produce signed provenance in the release/verifier domain.

CTRL-MEMORY-GOVERNANCE.description: Memory is quarantined; promotion requires a separate curator identity and multiple runs; no self-promotion.
CTRL-MEMORY-GOVERNANCE.remediation: Keep proposer_may_approve=false and require AERS_CURATOR_ID for promotion.

CTRL-DEPENDENCY-GOVERNANCE.description: Dependencies/skills are pinned and hash-verified; third-party skills treated as dependencies.
CTRL-DEPENDENCY-GOVERNANCE.remediation: Pin skills with sha256 in skills.lock.json and enforce hashes in lint.

CTRL-ROLLBACK.description: Every feature contract declares a rollout strategy and a rollback path.
CTRL-ROLLBACK.remediation: Require rollout.strategy and rollout.rollback in every feature contract (already enforced).

CTRL-OBSERVABILITY.description: Runs emit normalized, redacted trajectory/telemetry evidence.
CTRL-OBSERVABILITY.remediation: Emit trajectory JSONL and keep redact_by_default=true.

CTRL-RELEASE-SEGREGATION.description: Release runs in a separate identity; no release from an author worktree; no direct production shell.
CTRL-RELEASE-SEGREGATION.remediation: Keep release-policy forbidding release_from_worktree and agent_direct_production_shell.

CTRL-EVIDENCE-RETENTION.description: An immutable, machine-readable evidence manifest is retained per candidate.
CTRL-EVIDENCE-RETENTION.remediation: Generate and retain an evidence manifest for each candidate.

CTRL-EVALUATOR-HEALTH.description: The reviewers/auditors themselves are tested against seeded defects and canaries.
CTRL-EVALUATOR-HEALTH.remediation: Run the evaluator-health suite and block evaluator promotion on regression.

CTRL-SEGREGATION-OF-DUTIES.description: Author, reviewer, verifier, and release identities are distinct and non-overlapping.
CTRL-SEGREGATION-OF-DUTIES.remediation: Assign distinct identities per duty and record them.

CTRL-APPROVAL-RECORDS.description: Human/external approvals are recorded with identity and timestamp.
CTRL-APPROVAL-RECORDS.remediation: Record approval events in the ledger and evidence manifest.

CTRL-POLICY-VERSION-PINNING.description: Attestations pin the exact policy digest used, so post-hoc policy edits are detectable.
CTRL-POLICY-VERSION-PINNING.remediation: Pin policy_digest in the handoff and bind it in the attestation.

CTRL-EXCEPTION-HANDLING.description: Exceptions/waivers are auditable, time-bounded, and recorded rather than silent.
CTRL-EXCEPTION-HANDLING.remediation: Record every waiver with owner, scope, and expiry.

CTRL-RETENTION-REDACTION.description: Evidence is retained with default redaction of secrets/PII.
